prompt: Create immediate observability follow-up artifacts for this team. In teams/team_mn74d1g9_0f4d45/workspace, create or update two markdown files: (1) scheduled-run-audit-latest.md with sections: Detected Scheduled Runs, Goal Completion Assessment, Evidence, Gaps, Next Actions. (2) execution-handoff.md listing concrete next tasks for specific agents with owner + deliverable + due timing. If no completed scheduled run can be confirmed from available runtime data, state that explicitly and mark confidence low. Return a concise summary with file paths and task assignments.
